--- # This file is processed by Jekyll (front matter present). # The guide list is auto-generated from every page with `guide: true` # in its front matter — sorted by date, newest first. --- {{ site.title | default: "Study Guides" }}

{{ site.title | default: "Study Guides" }}

{{ site.description | default: "Interactive visualizers & notes" }}

Guides

{%- assign guides = site.pages | where: "guide", true | sort: "date" | reverse -%} {%- if guides.size > 0 %}
    {%- for g in guides %}
  • {%- if g.date %}
    {{ g.date | date: "%b %-d, %Y" }}
    {%- endif %}

    {{ g.title }}

    {%- if g.description %}

    {{ g.description }}

    {%- endif %}
    • {%- endfor %}
{%- else %}
No study guides found. Add guide: true to a page's front matter to list it here.
{%- endif %}
